_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of joint doctrine operations concepts (JP 3-0).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of entity resolution methods, including deterministic matching rules, probabilistic matching, and ML-based matching, and the precision-recall trade-offs involved.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.402), TF-K-003 (TF, cosine: 0.368).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.419). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [0, 3, concepts, doctrine, joint, jp] vs WIDAI-only terms [based, deterministic, entity, involved, matching, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.862, R=0.834). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:2.0%, N:73.8%, C:24.2%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of joint doctrine operations concepts (JP 3-0)." vs "Knowledge of entity resolution methods, including deterministic matching rules," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.425 ≈ STS 0.419 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [0, 3, concepts, doctrine, joint, jp]. WIDAI-only: [based, deterministic, entity, involved, matching, methods].
